title: Rich Fluffy Ukrainian Pork Dumplings
description: Earthly and festive Ukrainian dish featuring pork and spices, perfect for a special occasion, and can be made keto-friendly by using a low-carb wrapper
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, chopped onion, minced garlic, sliced mushroom, jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper, and mix well with your hands until just combined.
Wrap each dumpling in a low-carb ssam wrap, making sure to seal the edges tightly.
Place the dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each dumpling.
Brush the tops of the dumplings with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 18 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
To make the dish more festive, serve with a side of traditional Ukrainian sauces or dips.
Experiment with different types of low-carb wrappers to find the one that works best for you.
